case_title: ANNA GONTAR et al VS. HARLOT SF

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONTAR, ANNA CHEN, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARLOT SF $453.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $533.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY OF $165.00 FOR PLAINTIFF DAVID CHEN AND $288.00 TO PLAINTIFF ANNA GONTAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-30-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HARLOT SF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONTAR, ANNA CHEN, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARLOT SF $665.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $745.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF GONTAR, ANNA CHEN, DAVID ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-22-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-22-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREED. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY HARLOT SF IS GRANTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $665.00 FILED BY GONTAR, ANNA CHEN, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT HARLOT SF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HARLOT SF HEARING SET FOR MAR-22-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
